name: Weekends Sports and Entertainment
about: Weekends Sports & Entertainment is an entertainment venue offering a variety of activities including golf simulators, axe throwing, and cornhole. The facility provides a relaxed atmosphere with rotating food trucks and a selection of beverages. Golfers can enjoy simulated play with the option to book by the hour, with sessions accommodating groups of up to eight people. The venue operates Thursday through Sunday with extended weekend hours, combining casual recreation with social dining and drinking options.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient weekend and evening hours for flexible scheduling
No need for personal clubs, all equipment provided on-site
Sociable group environment suitable for casual play and celebrations
Integration with other activities like food and drinks for a full experience

food_and_drink.notes: Rotating food trucks serving a variety of dishes
Beer and other beverages available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides all necessary equipment for golf simulator play, so you don't need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue offers rotating food trucks and an on-site bar with beer and other beverages available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes would take approximately 90 minutes, as the pricing shows $75 for a 90-minute session, which would typically cover a full round of golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Weekends Sports & Entertainment is kid-friendly, welcoming families and offering activities suitable for various age groups in a casual environment.
